_experiment_id_note: Canary for experiment integrity. Any change to the `risk`, `thresholds`, or `ranking` blocks requires bumping this and starting a fresh run of 5 paper sessions. See CLAUDE.md § Experiment discipline. Bumped from exp-001 on 2026-04-14 to capture R7 (minimum-trade override waiver), R8 (SELL 2-of-3 soft rule), and R9 (versioned ranking weights).
_note: Watchlist is now DYNAMIC — assembled each run from Phase 1.5 (morning screen) + any open positions. No fixed ticker list lives in config anymore. See .claude/skills/stock-trading/SKILL.md Phase 1.5 for the screen mechanics. Providers: Alpaca (account + snapshots), TradingView MCP coin_analysis (one call per ticker — no bulk endpoint), Finnhub /calendar/earnings (one batched HTTP call).

screen._filter_notes: rsi_range='any' casts a wide net — both oversold reversals and breakout momentum surface in one pass, and Phase 4 ranks them. min_volume_ratio=1.5 is a RELATIVE multiplier vs the scanner's baseline, not an absolute share count. max_candidates=15 per exchange gives Phase 4 enough names to rank meaningfully. The only client-side floor is min_price (penny-stock guard) applied after coin_analysis returns a price.

risk._max_position_pct_note: Tighten target (autonomous-doctrine + live): 0.10. Current 0.20 is loose for paper mode only because a miscalibration is bounded by the paper account balance — NOT because a human reviews picks before they execute (no human checkpoint exists; see SKILL.md § Autonomous-experiment doctrine). Queued for tightening to 0.10 in a follow-up commit under a fresh experiment_id. Reverted from 0.25 to 0.20 on 2026-04-14 when the experiment was frozen under experiment_id=exp-001. Do not edit without bumping experiment_id.
risk._max_session_pct_note: Tighten target (autonomous-doctrine + live): 0.50. Current 0.80 is loose for paper mode only because a miscalibration is bounded by the paper account balance — NOT because a human reviews picks before they execute. Queued for tightening to 0.50 in a follow-up commit under a fresh experiment_id. Reverted from 1.00 to 0.80 on 2026-04-14 when the experiment was frozen under experiment_id=exp-001. Do not edit without bumping experiment_id.
risk._max_spread_pct_note: Tighten target (live): 0.003. UNLIKE the position/session caps, this value's looseness is NOT a human-review artifact — it exists so a tighter cap plus the current minimum-trade rule does not silently defeat the morning screen on wide-spread tickers. Tightening it without first reworking the minimum-trade-rule / screen-filter interaction would cause every run to skip every ticker. Before going live, tighten this to 0.003 AND rework the interaction so the experiment doesn't produce empty runs.

ranking._note: Weights for the Phase 4 candidate ranking heuristic. Sum must be 1.0. Any change bumps experiment_id.
